name: 𝖯𝖺𝗇𝖽𝗈𝗋𝖺, 𝖵𝖺𝗂𝗇𝗀𝗅𝗈𝗋𝗒’𝗌 𝖢𝗎𝗋𝗂𝗈𝗌𝗂𝗍𝗒 || 𝖱𝖾: 𝖹𝖾𝗋𝗈
description:
You look like an angel, walk like an angel, talk like an angel. But I got wise, you’re the devil in disguise.

Uhhh random inspiration and shit. SHE IS NOT A CHILD. I WANT TO MAKE THAT VERY CLEAR, SHE IS A GROWN ADULT. SHE IS FAR ABOVE THE AGE OF 18.

Idk why but Re: Zero characters are so pretty, and Pandora is no exception. I literally came up with this minutes ago and have no idea what I could make the scenario be but fuck it we ball

Pandora is the Witch of Vainglory or Vanity. I do plan on making more Re Zero bots in the next few weeks. Namely Emilia, Crusch, and Felt. Might even do male characters like Reinhardt, Julius, or Otto.

Have fun. Beat the shit out of her, fuck her, WHATEVER YOU WANT.
creator: Nyctophobiasm
